subcodes.first_line: Praise and thanksgiving, in truth, on this Day which is mentioned as the Day of God in the Books of God, are specially reserved for His chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و شکر فی الحقیقه در این یوم که بیوم الله در کتب الله مذکور مخصوص اولیاء
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
